subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! All praise be to Thee for having advanced Thy Cause, manifested Thy sovereignty and power, and sent forth unto all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی لک الحمد بما بلغت امرک و اظهرت سلطنتک و اقتدارک و ارسلت الی کل
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
